_comment: Auto-generated by scripts/redact_evidence.py. Every asset is REDACTED. See .claude/rules/10_safety_gate.md.

items.title: Bank Hongkong page -- 'WANTED' poster template (English)
items.caption: Predatory lender FB page publicly shaming an OFW with passport photos + full name. Pattern documented since Feb 2021. Heavily blurred to schematic-only level.
items.source_note: Public Facebook page screenshot, Imgur public album.

items.title: Bank Hongkong -- second 'WANTED' post variant
items.caption: Same template; second post visible. User had begun manual redaction (black bars over passport thumbnails) but full name remained in body text. Re-redacted defensively here.
items.source_note: Public Facebook page screenshot, Imgur public album.

items.title: Facebook user [composite reposter handle] reposting the 'WANTED' template
items.caption: Cropped Facebook post (Feb 24, 2021) -- same lender-shaming wording amplified by an individual user. Documents the viral-spread pattern.
items.source_note: Public Facebook page screenshot, Imgur public album.

items.title: Yoursun Caretaker -- 'asap pay ur overdues' shaming
items.caption: Two stacked posts (Apr 2024) targeting HK-based Filipina domestic helpers with passport photos + 'pay overdues' demands. Eyes-only redaction in original was insufficient -- fully blurred here.
items.source_note: Public Facebook page screenshot, Imgur public album.

items.title: Facebook trafficking-facilitation case -- legal research binder framework
items.caption: Sanitised summary of a 37,553-char legal research document outlining offences (insufficient content regulation, facilitating trafficking + money laundering, fraud/non-disclosure to shareholders) and the HK PDPO Cap. 486 + Money Lenders Cap. 163 framework for prosecution. Real victim names + agency identifiers redacted.
items.redaction_status: REDACTED (hand-summarized; victim names + specific agency identifiers removed; framework-only)
items.source_note: Original research document by an NGO casework team (~2024).

_schema.title: short headline
_schema.caption: 1-2 sentence description
